name: BEN_PIL_ELCTBL_CHC_POPL
description: BEN_PIL_ELCTBL_CHC_POPL identifies the persons and the programs or plans not in program for which they have electable choices as a result of a life event.  It contains information such as  the enrollment period start and end dates, default assigned date and theelections made date.

columns.Name: PIL_ELCTBL_CHC_POPL_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: DFLT_ENRT_DT
columns.Comments: This column holds Default enrollment date.

columns.Name: DFLT_ASND_DT
columns.Comments: This column holds Default assigned date.

columns.Name: ELCNS_MADE_DT
columns.Comments: This column holds Elections made date.

columns.Name: CLS_ENRT_DT_TO_USE_CD
columns.Comments: Close enrollment date to use code.

columns.Name: ENRT_TYP_CYCL_CD
columns.Comments: This column holds Enrollment type cycle.

columns.Name: ENRT_PERD_END_DT
columns.Comments: This column holds Enrollment period end date.

columns.Name: ENRT_PERD_STRT_DT
columns.Comments: This column holds Enrollment period start date.

columns.Name: PROCG_END_DT
columns.Comments: This column holds Processing end date.

columns.Name: PIL_ELCTBL_POPL_STAT_CD
columns.Comments: Person in life event electable program or plan status.

columns.Name: ACTY_REF_PERD_CD
columns.Comments: This column holds Activity reference period.

columns.Name: UOM
columns.Comments: This column holds Unit of measure.

columns.Name: AUTO_ASND_DT
columns.Comments: This column holds Automatically assigned date.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Comments: This column holds PROGRAM_APP_NAME

columns.Name: PROGRAM_NAME
columns.Comments: This column holds PROGRAM_NAME value

columns.Name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Concurrent Program who column - date when a program last updated this row).

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
